title: Bedrock Tools76
description: Bedrock Tools is a mod that adds tools from bedrock and obsidian to the game.
body:
# Bedrock Tools76 ## Description Bedrock Tools add obsidian and bedrock tools. These tools enable players to break bedrock and End portal frames, converting them into items. In Creative mode, players can use the added tools to defeat mobs with a single strike. The durability of bedrock tools is set at 60000, while obsidian tools have a durability of 3500. Although their mining speed is not particularly fast, these settings can be customized in the Config. Additionally, using an obsidian pickaxe to break bedrock reduces its durability by 1000. 

Required mods: MCPitanLib, Architectury API
(When using on Fabric Loader, Fabric API is also required)
Mod Loader: Fabric Loader, Forge Loader
License: MIT License
Modpack: Useable
